text: A street scene in a town. In the foreground, a man with a beard and mustache, wearing a light-colored shirt, looks towards the right. The background features a large, multi-story building with a green roof and white facade on the left, and a smaller, white building with red and white checkered patterns on the right. A utility pole with numerous wires stands in the middle ground. The area is surrounded by dense green foliage and trees. The sky is clear and blue.
